creator: dburr@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports->dburr

I had already submitted a port of V several months ago.  Unfortunately, 
it is a port of version 1.17, which is now no longer available on the 
ftp site.  I see this port is for 1.19.  Updating my v port was on 
my lists of things to do, but it looks like you have done a very good 
job of it.  I'll take a look at your port and will incorporate it into 
the v port. 

BTW, before submitting a new port, it is a good idea to check the latest 
ports tree, to make sure someone else didn't do the work for you :)  Either 
track ports using CVSup, or check 
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports-current/. 

Thanks!
